headline: Visualize Complex Codebases with Multi-Agent Knowledge Graphs
lede: Understand-Anything maps your repository's hidden dependencies into a coherent, navigable structure. By deploying parallel agents to parse logic and architectural layers, it turns monolithic source code into an interactive knowledge map.

headline: Anthropic Centralizes Plugin Development for Claude Code
lede: The official plugins repository provides a robust framework for extending AI assistance through vetted tools and custom skills. This marketplace ensures that community contributions remain modular, compatible, and ready for production-grade deployment.

headline: CodeGraph Accelerates Agent Queries with Local Semantic Indexing
lede: Stop relying on high-latency file scanning for your AI assistant’s context needs. CodeGraph maintains an SQLite-backed representation of your symbols and relationships, allowing for instantaneous, privacy-preserving queries across massive codebases.

headline: Master AI Engineering Through a Rigorous 428-Lesson Roadmap
lede: This repository moves beyond surface-level API calls to provide deep technical foundations in machine learning architecture. Each module requires hands-on implementation, ensuring you grasp the mathematics and infrastructure powering today's autonomous systems.

headline: FinceptTerminal Delivers Low-Latency Financial Intelligence
lede: Eschewing bloated web frameworks, this C++20 platform offers a high-performance, single-binary environment for quantitative analysis. It integrates complex derivatives pricing and agentic automation into a singular, resource-efficient interface.

headline: Codify AI Behavior with Karpathy-Inspired Skill Configurations
lede: Reduce hallucinations and over-engineering by imposing strict, verifiable constraints on your coding agents. This library translates proven architectural principles into actionable rules that keep your AI assistants focused, predictable, and clean.

headline: Standardizing .NET Workflows for AI-Driven Development
lede: The dotnet/skills repository brings professional-grade plugin support to the .NET ecosystem. By offloading complex tasks to vetted agents, developers can maintain higher reliability and speed during migration and scaffolding projects.

headline: Bridge Chrome DevTools with AI Agents via MCP
lede: Empower your coding agents to see and interact with live browser instances for true visual feedback. This bridge allows for automated performance tracing, network analysis, and console debugging directly within the development loop.

headline: Deploy 754 Expert-Verified Cybersecurity Skills to AI Agents
lede: Hardened defensive playbooks are now programmable through this extensive library of security-focused agent skills. Each skill maps directly to industry frameworks like MITRE ATT&CK, providing audit-ready, repeatable procedures for your security team.

headline: Self-Host Your AI-Powered Presentation Generation
lede: Presenton offers a privacy-first alternative to commercial slide generators, allowing for full control over templates and LLM backend choices. Sketch out your ideas and export them as clean, editable HTML or PPTX files entirely on your own terms.
